## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Knapsack and GrowthX to discuss performance, content strategy, and Clay implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance is promising, with 1.6K total impressions and 525 in the last week alone, indicating potential exponential growth](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Knapsack is refining its ICP focus, prioritizing independent financial advisors and compliance officers in finance](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - [Content strategy shift to include more AI workflow-building topics, competitor comparisons, and Knapsack-specific features](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [Clay.com implementation discussed for improved visitor identification and tracking](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance and Growth Trajectory

  - [Total impressions: 1.6K, with 525 (one-third) coming in the last week](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Observed pattern: Most impressions and clicks occurred in the last 3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Prediction: Exponential growth expected if content quality and quantity maintain](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Backlink profile: Currently at 12, expected to grow to 50-100+ as content gains traction](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Keywords ranking up, with more diversity in topics covered](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)

### Content Strategy Evolution

  - [Initial focus: ICP, meeting preparation, AI in finance/healthcare, data privacy](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [New angles:](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
    1.  Building AI workflows (current week focus)
    2.  Comparing Knapsack with competitors (planned for next week)
    3.  Highlighting Knapsack features (planned for week after next)
  - [Aim to balance core topics with expanded AI-related content](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)

### Refined ICP Focus

1.  Independent Financial Advisors
    
      - [Context: Upcoming wealth transfer from baby boomers](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
      - [Needs: AI use with sensitive data, meeting prep, compliance checking](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
      - [Pain points: Can't use public AI tools due to regulatory constraints](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)

2.  Compliance Officers in Finance
    
      - [Needs: Early warning systems, regulatory compliance checks](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
      - [Use cases: Checking transcripts, emails for compliance adherence](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)

3.  Physicians (future focus)
    
      - [Needs: Patient notes, pre-authorization automations](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
      - [Challenge: Currently Windows-only, Knapsack is Mac-only](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)

4.  Pharmaceutical Company CTOs/Data Managers
    
      - [Context: Tech-forward, clinical trials, drug development](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
      - [Needs: HIPAA-compliant tools for data processing](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)

### Clay.com Implementation

  - [Basic setup capturing visitor data, but underreporting compared to actual traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
  - [Potential for improved visitor identification and tracking](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Adjust content strategy to focus on new ICPs, particularly independent financial advisors and compliance officers](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - [Develop content around compliance automations and AI tools for financial advisors](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
  - [Research and incorporate information about major financial institutions' AI implementations (e.g., JP Morgan, Morgan Stanley) as context](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
  - [Continue optimizing Clay.com implementation for better visitor tracking](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
  - [Maintain focus on core topics while expanding into AI workflow-building content](https://fathom.video/share/Ez6x36mFa69tQ2owp3Zy7noe1doXnHTe?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
